```plantuml
@startuml
class MonoBehaviour {
}

class SwordAttack {
  + animator : Animator
  + attackDamage : float = 50f
  + staminaCost : float = 15f
  - {static} <<readonly>> hIsAttacking : int
  + playerStats : Stats.Stats
  noOfClicks : int
  - canClick : bool
  - {static} <<readonly>> hAttackNo : int
  Start() : void
  Update() : void
  - OnTriggerEnter(other:Collider) : void
  - ComboStarter() : void
  + ComboCheck() : void
}

MonoBehaviour <|-- SwordAttack
@enduml
```
